comment: This file exists solely to declare npm overrides for transitive dependencies pulled in via `eventsourcingdb > testcontainers > ...`. All overrides patch known security advisories reported by `deno audit`. See https://docs.deno.com/runtime/fundamentals/node/#first-class-package.json-support and https://docs.npmjs.com/cli/v9/configuring-npm/package-json#overrides.
